evidence: "A wonderfully big small movie filled with heart and soul."
"I found this to be more fun than almost any Tarantino film except Pulp fiction."
"This is a very simple movie but enjoyable for just a mindless romp and a few good well timed laughs."
"This shows that there is such a fine line between comedy and tragedy and in this show the line is thinner than a razors edge."
"This is not high quality oscar worthy by any means but a simple enjoyable bit of escapism."
"I do not mean to be cruel but this show must have been written by and for morons."
"This is not high quality oscar worthy by any means."
"Everything about this movie borders on silly... the acting and the production values are among the worst I have ever seen."
"I have seen every episode at least once and it is creative brave often stupid sometimes smart but ALWAYS ALWAYS ENTERTAINING."
"What a great work of love, of craftsmanship. This is spellbinding, in the truest sense of the word."
"This is a testament to that hope and the importance of finding solutions to problems the politicians have only made worse."
"I promise you laughs tears and sincerity."
"This is a most enjoyable experience. share it, create around it, teachers, families, friends this should be an event not just a film."

additional_patterns.name: humor_preference
evidence: "This is a plate of stinking garbage in every way shape and form."
"I have to agree with the other reviews who proclaim it to be one of the funniest shows of all time!"

summary: The user enjoys a mix of comedy and drama, often appreciating films that evoke strong emotions and feature engaging narratives. They have a low sensitivity to production quality, indicating a preference for entertaining content over polished visuals.
